creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #4)

I like your idea, I think it is better than mine. It allows to distinguish members and reviewers but it is simpler than what I was proposing. In particular, it will make things easier for report submitters.

Please name the new group just "status": it is now becoming the official name of the team, it is consitent with the new email address (status@) and with the already well known page https://www.freebsd.org/status/.

Thanks.
